TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Pasumaq, title = Pasumaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pasumaq} }

S.FORM: Pasumaq i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Pasumaq. u kasalumaluma' nu Pasumaq sa, 109 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 339 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 320 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 19 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 92%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: pasuma* i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu pasuma*. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu pasuma* sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai *%, bunun *%, amis *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Pasumaq i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Pasumaq. u kasalumaluma' nu Pasumaq sa, 109 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 339 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 320 ku tademaw, pakalatu 94%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 19 ku tademaw, pakalatu 6%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 92%, Rukai 1%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: pasuma* i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu pasuma*. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu pasuma* sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, *ukai *%, bunun *%, amis *%, zumazuma *%.
